resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def minPartitions(self, n: str) -> int:
        return max(int(digit) for digit in n)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a generator expression to iterate over each character in the input string, converts each character to an integer, and returns the maximum value. This approach is efficient because it only requires a single pass through the input string and does not use any additional data structures.
